stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin rally-killer GIDP · Top 2
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso. Josh Rojas out at 2nd. Nick Loftin out at 1st.
